category_sources: Official GitHub README describes magic-wormhole.rs as a Rust port for getting things from one computer to another safely.
source_facts.description: Rust implementation of Magic Wormhole, with new features and enhancements.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is magic-wormhole.rs; official GitHub repository is magic-wormhole/magic-wormhole.rs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states there are no hosted docs for the project at the moment and points users to README/CLI README and cargo docs.
docs.rs hosts the official Rust crate API documentation for magic-wormhole.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input; returning null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a Rust Magic Wormhole implementation; source_facts.executables lists wormhole-rs.
